mentions.note: Small-cap ($1.7B market cap) providing critical connectors, cable hardware for data center and grid buildout; 24% sequential earnings beat, 19% YoY growth; doubled past 12 months but still positioned for data center upside; pull back from $400 to $340s offers entry point.
Small-cap grid and data center hardware maker with a 24% sequential earnings beat; pullback from $400+ to the $340s offers a good entry at 35x earnings on a ~$13/share 2028 estimate.
